title: IAST Advanced + ML Anomaly Detection — Taint Tracking Production Hardening
description: iast_advanced.py uses AST-based control/data flow analysis, taint tracking, symbolic execution, and numpy-based statistical anomaly detection. test_anomaly_ml.py and test_cloud_security_analytics_engine.py cluster here. Gap: taint tracking is done on Python AST only (not bytecode), missing cross-function taint propagation, and numpy anomaly detection is not connected to the real-time event stream.
missing: Cross-function taint propagation: implement inter-procedural analysis that follows tainted values through function call boundaries using a call graph
Real-time event stream integration: consume EventBus events in the anomaly detector so ML models score live request patterns instead of only batch AST scans
Bytecode-level analysis: use dis module to analyze compiled .pyc files and detect taint flows that are obfuscated at the source level
